features.title: Edmund Rice Values
features.description: Character formation based on Christian values of compassion, justice, and respect.

features.title: Academic Excellence
features.description: Comprehensive curriculum designed to nurture intellectual growth and critical thinking.

features.title: Holistic Development
features.description: Focus on emotional, social, physical, and spiritual development of every child.

features.title: Individual Attention
features.description: Small class sizes ensuring personalized learning and mentorship for each student.

features.title: Global Perspective
features.description: International exposure and multicultural learning environment preparing students for the world.

features.title: Innovation & Technology
features.description: Modern facilities and technology-integrated learning for 21st-century skills.

principalMessage.name: Dr. Mary Johnson
principalMessage.message: At Abc, we believe that education is not just about academic achievement, but about nurturing the whole person. Our commitment to Edmund Rice values ensures that each student develops not only intellectually but also morally and spiritually.

announcements.title: Winter Break Schedule
announcements.content: School will be closed from December 25, 2024 to January 6, 2025. Classes resume on January 7, 2025.

announcements.title: Annual Sports Day 2024
announcements.content: Join us for our Annual Sports Day on December 20, 2024. Parents are cordially invited.

announcements.title: Parent-Teacher Conference
announcements.content: Scheduled meetings with parents for academic progress discussion from December 18-19, 2024.

testimonials.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.content: Abc has provided my son with not just excellent education, but also strong moral values. The teachers are dedicated and caring.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.content: The foundation I received at Abc prepared me well for engineering college and life. Forever grateful to this institution.

testimonials.name: Mrs. Priya Sharma
testimonials.content: The holistic approach to education here is remarkable. My daughter has grown tremendously in confidence and character.
